title: Verify check_entry_gates() is live post-restart: confirm gate rejections and no sub-0.60 bridge entries
allowed_files: sports_bot_v2/bot_core.py (read-only, ONLY if startup log is ambiguous)
forbidden_files: Any file not in allowed list
acceptance:
- read_only_confirmed: true
- Restart timing established (confirmed or explicitly marked unconfirmed)
- Explicit PASS/FAIL on sub-0.60 trades since restart
- Explicit YES/NO on gate rejection log evidence
- Overall verdict with gate_is_live value
